description: Scorched earth and relentless sun where water is worth more than gold and the horizon shimmers with heat.
biomes: Arid
Cracked earth and sparse scrub under a merciless sun. The heat radiates from the ground and nothing offers shade.
Rocky
Fields of broken stone baking in the sun. Sharp edges and loose footing make every step a negotiation.
Wasteland
Flat, featureless ground stretching in every direction. Nothing grows, nothing moves, and the silence presses against your ears.
Tundra
A cold desert where dry wind strips the moisture from everything it touches. The ground is hard and the sky is white.
Badlands
Eroded ridges and gullies of crumbling earth in shades of rust and grey. The terrain changes with every rainstorm.
Dunes
Rolling hills of fine sand that shift overnight. The wind sculpts new ridges by morning, burying yesterday's tracks.
Salt Flats
A blinding white plain of crusted salt stretching to the horizon. The ground crunches underfoot and nothing survives here long.
Glass Desert
Sand fused into sheets of dark glass by some ancient heat. The surface reflects the sky and cracks like ice underfoot.
Oasis
A patch of green and cool water surrounded by endless sand. Beautiful and inviting, though not everything here is as kind as it seems.
Mirage Fields
The air warps with heat, showing lakes and cities that do not exist. Even your own shadow seems to lie.
